projects.title: Pharm Flow
projects.subtitle: Workflow Management
projects.description: A process visualization and management app for tracking prescription lifecycles and dispensing workflows.

projects.title: Multi-Calc
projects.subtitle: Pharmacy Utility
projects.description: A versatile calculation tool supporting multiple specialized formulas for everyday pharmacy operations.

projects.title: Rx Breaker
projects.subtitle: Arcade Game
projects.description: A pharmacy-themed brick breaker game built using vanilla HTML5 canvas. Smash the pills to win!

projects.title: Workflow
projects.subtitle: Task Management
projects.description: A Kanban-style task management board tailored for internal dev teams to track app progress.

projects.title: MF Maker
projects.subtitle: Utility App
projects.description: A micro-frontend scaffolding tool designed to streamline project setup and component generation.

projects.title: Sports Hub
projects.subtitle: Dashboard
projects.description: A personalized dashboard for tracking favorite sports teams, scores, and upcoming schedules.

projects.title: Pomodoro Timer
projects.subtitle: Productivity
projects.description: A focused work timer applying the Pomodoro technique, complete with customizable intervals and alerts.

projects.title: RTS Calculator
projects.subtitle: Clinical Tool
projects.description: Return-to-stock calculator helping technicians determine viability and expiration dates for returned medications.

projects.title: Shipping Calc
projects.subtitle: Logistics
projects.description: Estimates shipping costs and transit times based on package dimensions, weight, and destination zip codes.

projects.title: SSP Public
projects.subtitle: Landing Page
projects.description: The public-facing informational site for Sterling Specialty Pharmacy, detailing services and contact information.

projects.title: Weather Center
projects.subtitle: API Integration
projects.description: A real-time weather tracking application pulling data from external meteorological APIs.

projects.title: Zen Snake
projects.subtitle: Casual Game
projects.description: A relaxing, modern take on the classic Snake game featuring smooth animations and ambient colors.
